history.text: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A triptych of a young Indonesian couple posing playfully against a light blue and white patterned wallpaper backdrop. In the top panel, the girl, with long dark hair and a light beige crewneck sweater, smiles with her eyes closed, one arm bent with her hand on her head. Beside her, the boy, wearing a green jacket over a white collared shirt, flexes his bicep with an excited expression and open mouth. In the middle panel, both strike a peace sign pose, the girl with a pout and the boy with a wide grin. In the bottom panel, the girl looks thoughtfully to the side, a finger on her chin, while the boy looks directly at the camera with his tongue sticking out slightly, arms crossed over his chest. The lighting is bright and even, highlighting the subjects and their playful interactions. The color palette is dominated by the earthy tones of their clothing (beige and green) against the soft pastel background. The mood is youthful, energetic, and fun.
